task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "获取用户输入的音频文件目录路径"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "验证目录路径是否有效"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "列出目录中所有支持的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "提示用户选择要处理的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "解析用户选择并生成待处理文件列表"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "逐个分析音频文件的基本信息（采样率、比特率、时长）"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "使用librosa加载音频数据并计算高级指标"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "评估采样率是否达到标准（≥44.1kHz）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "评估比特率是否达到标准（≥128kbps或无损编码）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "检测音频中是否存在异常静音段"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "生成分析报告，包括质量检查结果和处理建议"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "提示用户对需要优化的文件进行后续操作"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "validatePath"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "listFiles"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "promptUser"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "parseSelection"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "analyzeFile"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "loadAudioData"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "checkSampleRate"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "checkBitRate"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node10", "type": "detectSilence"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node11", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "suggestActions"}]}
